BlobId.description:
Canonical realm-local blob identifier.

The identifier is content-addressed, but storage and GC semantics remain
realm-scoped.

CapabilityId.description:
Slug-validated capability identifier for skill requirements.

Replaces the legacy `Vec<String>` capability lists with a typed
namespace. Parsed at construction, so callers cannot smuggle invalid
identifiers into descriptors or requirements.

oneOf.description: Base64-encoded inline bytes used for ingress and live execution.
Durable blob reference used by persisted history/runtime state.
Base64-encoded inline bytes used for ingress and live execution.

ContentInput.description:
Input content that can be either a plain text string or multimodal content blocks.

Deserializes from either `"text"` or `[{type: "text", text: "..."}, ...]`.
Provides `From<String>` and `From<&str>` for ergonomic construction.

DeferredCatalogDelta.description: Additive hidden-catalog delta metadata for runtime notices.

ExternalToolDeltaPhase.description: Canonical lifecycle phase for external-tool boundary deltas.

HookId.description: Stable identifier for a configured hook.

HookPatch.description: Typed patch intents used by rewrite hooks.

oneOf.description: Replace assistant text content in the latest model response.
Mutate tool result payload before it is persisted.

HookPatchEnvelope.description: Stable envelope emitted for async patch publication.

HookReasonCode.description: Typed reason codes for guardrail denials.

LlmRetryFailure.description: Typed recoverable LLM failure carried through retry authority.

message.description:
Human-readable diagnostic. The `kind` and numeric fields are the
authority payload; this string is a display projection.

LlmRetryFailureKind.description: Closed classifier for recoverable LLM failures.

LlmRetryPlan.description: Typed retry delay plan selected for a recoverable LLM failure.

LlmRetrySchedule.description: Recoverable LLM retry lifecycle payload accepted by turn authority.

SessionId.description: Unique identifier for a session (UUID v7 for time-ordering)

SkillKey.description:
Canonical runtime identity for a skill.

This is the single identity carried across every surface — the wire parses
directly into this struct, tools receive this struct, the registry stores
this struct. There is no slash-delimited string path form.

ToolConfigChangeDomain.description: Optional typed domain for tool-configuration change payloads.

ToolConfigChangeOperation.description: Operation kind for live tool configuration changes.

ToolConfigChangeStatus.description: Structured status data for live tool configuration change notifications.

ToolConfigChangedPayload.description: Payload for tool configuration change notifications.

AgentEvent.description:
Events emitted during agent execution

These events form the streaming API for consumers.

oneOf.description: A rewrite patch was applied synchronously.
A background patch was published for downstream surfaces.
Text generation complete for this turn

has_images.description: Whether the tool result contains image content blocks.

estimated_history_tokens.description: Estimated total history tokens before compaction.

input_tokens.description: Input tokens from the last LLM call that triggered compaction.

oneOf.description: Context compaction failed (non-fatal — agent continues with uncompacted history).
A skill reference could not be resolved.

error.description: Legacy display mirror for consumers still reading string errors.

reason.description: Structured reason for the failure. Legacy payloads deserialize as `unknown`.

reference.description: Legacy display mirror for consumers still reading string references.

skill_key.description: Canonical structured skill identity/reference, when resolution had one.

oneOf.description: An interaction completed successfully (terminal event for tap subscribers).

An interaction reached an external callback boundary and is waiting for
tool results before the session can continue.
An interaction failed (terminal event for tap subscribers).

Some streaming events were dropped due to channel backpressure.
Best-effort marker — the terminal event is authoritative.
Live tool configuration changed for this session.
A background shell job completed (or failed/cancelled/timed out).

StreamScopeFrame.description: Scope attribution frame for multi-agent streaming.

oneOf.description: Mob member scope for flow dispatch turns.

ToolConfigChangeDomain.description: Optional typed domain for tool-configuration change payloads.

ToolConfigChangeOperation.description: Operation kind for live tool configuration changes.

ToolConfigChangeStatus.description: Structured status data for live tool configuration change notifications.

ToolConfigChangedPayload.description: Payload for tool configuration change notifications.

ScopedAgentEvent.description: Attributed stream event wrapper for multi-agent streaming.
ScopedAgentEvent.title: ScopedAgentEvent

WireEvent.description: Event envelope: session_id, sequence, event (AgentEvent), contract_version
WireEvent.note: AgentEvent schema is emitted above. known_event_types stays as a lightweight canonical inventory for surface drift checks.
